sqlMap.select: select mem_id, mem_pass from member where mem_id = #mem_id# and mem_pass = #mem_pass#
select b.mem_id from mem_detail a, member b where b.mem_name= #mem_name# and a.mem_tel = #mem_tel#
select mem_pass from member where mem_name = #mem_name# and mem_id = (select mem_id from mem_detail where mem_id = #mem_id# and mem_tel = #mem_tel#)
